category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Nigeria) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Nigeria Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入奈及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Nigerian requirements: mandatory SONCAP (Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate) administered by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria, NIS IEC 62133 cell safety, NCC type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与尼日利亚要求对照：由尼日利亚标准组织（SON）管理的强制性SONCAP（产品证书加每批次SONCAP证书）、NIS IEC 62133电芯安全、无线功能的NCC型号核准、UN 38.3运输及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與奈及利亞要求對照：由奈及利亞標準組織（SON）管理的強制性SONCAP（產品證書加每批次SONCAP證書）、NIS IEC 62133電芯安全、無線功能的NCC型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Nigeria must obtain a SONCAP Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate from the Standards Organisation of Nigeria on the NIS IEC 62133 safety basis, NCC type approval where wireless functions are present, a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and must ship through a registered in-country Nigerian importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 向尼日利亚出口锂电池及移动电源的中国出口商，须从尼日利亚标准组织（SON）取得基于NIS IEC 62133安全基准的SONCAP产品证书及每批次SONCAP证书，含无线功能时须取得NCC型号核准，须持有有效的UN 38.3运输报告，并须经由已注册的尼日利亚本地进口商出货——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 向奈及利亞出口鋰電池及行動電源的中國出口商，須從奈及利亞標準組織（SON）取得基於NIS IEC 62133安全基準的SONCAP產品證書及每批次SONCAP證書，含無線功能時須取得NCC型號核准，須持有有效的UN 38.3運輸報告，並須經由已登記的奈及利亞本地進口商出貨——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from son.gov.ng, soncap.son.gov.ng, ncc.gov.ng, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
